# Venus Universe Nehrunagar — Luxury 4 and 5 BHK in Nehrunagar Ahmedabad

> Luxury 4 and 5 BHK in Nehrunagar Ahmedabad — Venus Universe Nehrunagar (Venus Nehrunagar). Premium under-construction 4 BHK and 5 BHK apartments. Pre-booking open. Site office welcoming visitors.

Venus Universe (also known as Venus Universe Nehrunagar, Venus Nehrunagar, Venus Nehrunagar Ahmedabad, Venus Universe Ahmedabad, Venus Universe Nehrunagar Ahmedabad) is a luxury under-construction residential project offering luxury 4 and 5 BHK in Nehrunagar Ahmedabad. Located in Nehrunagar, central Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India, the project offers premium 4 BHK and 5 BHK apartments ranging from 1,550 sq ft to 2,475 sq ft carpet area, including duplex penthouses and jodi-house options.

## Key Facts

- Project name: Venus Universe Nehrunagar
- Developer: Venus Group (Venus Grounds 2)
- Location: Nehrunagar, Ahmedabad, Gujarat 380015, India
- Configuration: Luxury 4 BHK and 5 BHK apartments
- Carpet sizes: 1,550 / 1,775 / 2,100 / 2,475 sq ft
- Status: Under construction, pre-booking open
- Site office: Open for visits in Nehrunagar, Ahmedabad
- Land parcel: 7 acres, 70% open area, 2.2 acre podium
- Architect: Hafeez Contractor
- Landscape: SWA, California
- Interiors: HBA, Singapore
- Lighting: LET, Dubai
- EOI: ₹5,00,000 (100% refundable) — locks priority allotment & pre-launch pricing

## Why Venus Universe Nehrunagar

Nehrunagar is the most premium central micro-market of Ahmedabad — minutes from CG Road, Ashram Road, Paldi, IIM Ahmedabad, top schools, hospitals and retail. Venus Universe is one of the largest luxury 4 & 5 BHK developments in Nehrunagar.
